title: Why This Is the Most Exciting Time to Be Human | Ken Ono, Axiom Math
summary: Ken Ono argues that humans cannot compete with AI on knowledge and that true intelligence in the age of AI lies in curiosity and human judgment. Drawing on the legacy of mathematician Ramanujan, Ono contends that exceptional human insight and creativity remain the defining strengths as machines gain knowledge dominance.
